markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align SEO strategy with Alex's new product positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Product Strategy:** Alex is repositioning as an "agentic recruiting platform" with four distinct products: Interview, Connect, Discover, and Verify.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**SEO Support:** Growth X will provide on-page SEO recommendations (H1s, meta tags) for the new product pages to capture high-intent commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:** The "Best AI Recruiting Tools" article, which is losing sessions, will be optimized to align with the new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Paid & Organic Sync:** Alex's paid ad data (e.g., non-branded keyword performance, CAC) will inform organic strategy to build a stronger, cohesive SERP presence.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Topics

### New Product Strategy & Website Launch

  - [Alex is repositioning as an "agentic recruiting platform" with four distinct products: Interview, Connect, Discover, and Verify.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [New website pages are in production for a planned launch by the end of this week.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [**Launch Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Four individual product pages](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [One main platform page](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Two solutions pages (Enterprise, Staffing)](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### SEO Support for New Pages

  - [Growth X will provide on-page SEO recommendations for the new product pages to capture high-intent commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Goal:** Optimize elements like H1s, H2s, and meta descriptions to improve organic search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [The current page title "Interviewing agent" has low search volume (\~20/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [A better target is "AI interview platform," which has higher volume and is more likely to rank for commercial intent.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Process:** Growth X will add suggestions directly to Alex's Google Doc drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Content Performance & Optimization

  - [**Production:** 10 articles are in production; 3 are ready and will be sent by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Published:** 10 articles are live but require image updates to correct number discrepancies.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Optimization Target:** The "Best AI Recruiting Tools" article is losing sessions after an initial post-publish spike.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Action:** Optimize the article to align with the new product messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Paid Ads Strategy & SEO Sync

  - [Alex's paid ad strategy will inform organic efforts to build a stronger, cohesive SERP presence.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Paid Ad Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
    1.  [**Brand Protection:** Bid on branded keywords to block competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
    2.  [**Retargeting:** Run ads to re-engage website visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
    3.  [**Competitor & Keyword Bidding (pre-EOW):** Target "Paradox alternative" and general SEM terms like "AI interviewing agent."](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Organic-Paid Sync:** Paid ad data (e.g., non-branded keyword performance, CAC) will inform organic strategy, as it signals high-value terms worth pursuing for long-term growth.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### SEO Tooling & Limitations

  - [**SEMrush Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Keyword Gap:** Compares domains to find keyword opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
          - [**Limitation:** Less accurate since Google retired the `parameter=100` feature in September, which provided data beyond the first page of results.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [**Keyword Magic Tool:** Generates keyword variations from a seed term.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [**Keyword Overview:** Provides detailed data for a specific keyword or list.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [**Other Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Google Keyword Planner:** Recommended for paid ad keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Google Search Console:** The most accurate source of organic performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
      - [**ClearScope:** Useful for optimizing existing content with initial traction, like the "Best AI Recruiting Tools" article.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo (Growth X):**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Send 3 ready articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Add SEO suggestions (H1s, meta tags) to the new product page drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Deliver a brief site audit summary by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [**Donald (Alex):**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Share the Google Doc with new product page content for review.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [Discuss the new Alex positioning and its impact on content strategy next week.](https://fathom.video/share/RZjhXF5fseN_bPxsZnvJN4bs-zs4U1Jo?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
